description: Docs-only server environment contract for a future approved deployment. No values are stored here.

categories.name: Readiness mode env
categories.rule: Set to launch only when enforcing production-security readiness in the hosted/runtime environment.

categories.name: Public-safe client env
categories.rule: No public client env is currently required; future public vars must be non-secret and separately reviewed.

categories.name: Server-only app env
categories.rule: Used only by server-side Next.js routes, repositories, and helpers.

categories.name: Supabase/project env
categories.rule: Used only server-side with RLS and trusted workspace review.

categories.name: n8n/server-only webhook env
categories.rule: n8n webhook values stay behind first-party server routes.

categories.name: Admin/auth/workspace env
categories.rule: Protected admin paths use trusted server-side workspace and request-security configuration.

categories.name: Forbidden env exposure
categories.rule: Do not expose Supabase, n8n, service-role, workspace, admin, quote, provider, or secret values to the browser.

variables.name: SKR_PRODUCTION_READINESS_MODE
variables.requiredFor: Explicitly selecting launch enforcement mode for the readiness command
variables.notes: Use value launch only when running the production-security readiness command in the hosted/runtime environment.

variables.name: SUPABASE_URL
variables.requiredFor: Server-side Supabase reads and approved writes
variables.notes: Read only by website server-side Supabase helpers.

variables.name: SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
variables.notes: Used only from server-side code with RLS; not exposed as public config.

variables.name: CATALOGUE_WORKSPACE_ID
variables.requiredFor: DB-backed catalogue list and detail reads
variables.notes: Must match the database-owned active catalogue workspace config row before public traffic.

variables.name: QUOTE_WORKSPACE_ID
variables.notes: Trusted server-side workspace gate for public quote submissions.

variables.name: ADMIN_TRUSTED_WORKSPACE_ID
variables.requiredFor: Protected admin catalogue, listing media, and quote workflow operations
variables.notes: Must be reviewed separately from catalogue and quote workspace settings.

variables.name: ADMIN_EXPECTED_ORIGIN
variables.notes: Trusted deployment origin for protected admin routes.

variables.name: ADMIN_EXPECTED_HOST
variables.requiredFor: Expected host validation for protected admin routes
variables.notes: Trusted deployment host for protected admin routes.

variables.name: ADMIN_CSRF_PROOF_SECRET
variables.notes: Server-only proof signing secret; never include values in docs.

variables.name: CHAT_PROVIDER
variables.notes: Defaults safely in local development; deployment should set the reviewed provider.

variables.name: N8N_CHAT_WEBHOOK_URL
variables.notes: Must remain server-only and must never be copied from local chat config files.

variables.name: N8N_CHAT_WEBHOOK_TIMEOUT_MS
variables.requiredFor: Temporary server-side n8n provider timeout control
variables.notes: Optional server-side tuning value with safe runtime defaults.

variables.name: CHAT_TRUSTED_CLIENT_IP_HEADER
variables.requiredFor: Trusted proxy or CDN client IP bucket selection
variables.notes: Set only to a header overwritten by the trusted deployment edge.

variables.name: QUOTE_TRUSTED_CLIENT_IP_HEADER
variables.requiredFor: Trusted proxy or CDN client IP bucket selection
variables.notes: Set only to a header overwritten by the trusted deployment edge.

variables.name: QUOTE_ENQUIRY_EMAIL_PROVIDER
variables.notes: Defaults to resend when missing or blank; unsupported values fail readiness validation without echoing the raw value.

variables.name: QUOTE_ENQUIRY_EMAIL_RECIPIENT
variables.requiredFor: Business recipient for internal quote enquiry email delivery
variables.notes: Must be a valid email address. Admin status may show only a redacted recipient.

variables.name: QUOTE_ENQUIRY_EMAIL_FROM
variables.requiredFor: Verified Resend sender/from address for internal quote enquiry email delivery
variables.notes: Must be a valid email address approved for the Resend sending domain.

variables.name: RESEND_API_KEY
variables.requiredFor: Resend provider API authentication for internal quote enquiry email delivery
variables.notes: Secret value must never be printed, committed, exposed to admin UI, or sent to the browser.

forbidden.reason: Browser Supabase remains deferred and must not be configured.
n8n must remain behind the first-party server API boundary.
Service-role keys must never be browser/client/public env.
Public demo-content runtime support has been removed; production must use hosted Supabase data or honest empty states.
Service-role runtime paths remain deferred and must not be added.
